banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock founder: Rajesh Kumar, a Singapore Citizen incorporating a brand-new single-founder exempt private company, 'Kumar Trading Pte. Ltd.', a general wholesale-trading business. Rajesh is the company's sole director and sole shareholder, self-filing (no corporate service provider), issuing SGD 1,000 of ordinary shares fully paid in cash, and adopting ACRA's model constitution. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

conformanceCheck.method: Programmatic re-derivation of every field's effective requiredness from the schema's own requiredWhen/required members (a GSP-0013 condition evaluator), cross-checked against collectedValues + notApplicableFields for exact 1:1 coverage of all 47 fields in schema.fields. Mutation tests confirmed the founderResidencyStatus eligibility gate, the isExemptFromNomineeRegisters/constitutionType requiredWhen flips, and all three nominee_and_controller_declarations exit transitions (nominee-arrangement-out-of-scope, unable-to-identify-controllers-out-of-scope, multi-controller-out-of-scope) fire correctly, plus the baseline scenario's fall-through to share_capital and the paidUpNotAboveIssued crossFieldValidation rule.
